topic_title: South Korean vessel damaged by explosion in the Strait of Hormuz
topic_summary: The South Korean government is investigating a strike on an HMM vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, with officials debating whether to join a US-led maritime mission. While the main opposition party has criticized the government for not explicitly naming Iran as the perpetrator, Seoul has stated that attacks on civilian ships will not be tolerated.

findings.title: Multinational talks held on restoring navigation through Hormuz
findings.summary:
Multinational talks held on restoring navigation through Hormuz

    
    

        
    
                Defence ministers and representatives from more than 40 countries held talks on Monday regarding military contributions to a European-led mission to escort commercial vessels and restore maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

The discussions took place remotely amid growing tensions in the region and increasing concerns over the security of one of the world’s most important shipp...

findings.title: Robots to the rescue? South Korea looks for AI solutions to dwindling army numbers
findings.summary:
South Korea’s military is exploring a strategic partnership with Hyundai Motor to potentially deploy robotics to the front lines as Seoul accelerates investment in AI-powered, unmanned systems to tackle a deepening troop shortage.
The defence ministry said it was discussing cooperation with Hyundai as part of efforts to respond to changes in the battlefield environment and develop a “hi-tech, science-driven force”, though specific details have yet to be finalised.
The Korea Economic Daily fir...

findings.title: Tankers reportedly disable trackers to avoid attacks in Hormuz
findings.summary:
Tankers reportedly disable trackers to avoid attacks in Hormuz

    
    

        
    
                Three oil tankers carrying crude have passed through the Strait of Hormuz with their tracking systems switched off in an apparent effort to avoid potential Iranian attacks, according to a Reuters report citing shipping data from Kpler and LSEG.

Two very large crude carriers, the Agios Fanourios I and the Kiara M, each transporting about 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude, exited the waterwa...

findings.title: Iran demands sovereignty over Hormuz in counterproposal to US
findings.summary:
Iran demands sovereignty over Hormuz in counterproposal to US

    
    

        
    
                Iran, in its counterproposal to end the conflict with the United States and Israel, is demanding full compensation for war damage, the lifting of all sanctions and recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz, according to reports by Iranian state media.

Press TV and IRIB said the proposal also called for the release of frozen Iranian assets and was delivered to W...

findings.title: Hegseth rejects senator’s claims US munitions are depleted
findings.summary:
Hegseth rejects senator’s claims US munitions are depleted

    
    

        
    
                US Secretary of War Pete Hegseth rejected claims by Democratic Senator Mark Kelly that American munitions stockpiles had been significantly depleted by the war involving Iran.

Writing on X, Hegseth criticised Kelly, a retired Navy captain, accusing him of speaking publicly about what he described as a classified Pentagon briefing.

findings.title: PMD issues Glof alert for KP, Gilgit-Baltistan as rainfall predicted in upper Pakistan
findings.summary:
The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD)  has issued an alert for glacial lake outburst floods (Glof) for Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and Gilgit-Baltistan, it emerged on Monday.
According to the alert issued by the PMD on Sunday night, a moderate westerly wave was expected to enter the upper regions of the country. It said that the weather system was expected to hit KP and extend to Gilgit-Baltistan by Monday.
During this period, the department predicted widespread rain and wind-thunderstorms, wit...

findings.title: Tchad: les jihadistes «savent très bien qu'il va y avoir une contre-attaque» de l’armée dans la région du lac
findings.summary: Le gouvernement tchadien a décrété le 7 mai l'état d'urgence pour une durée de vingt jours dans la province du Lac (ouest), à la suite d’attaques attribuées à Boko Haram, qui ont fait au moins 26 morts dans les rangs de l'armée et plusieurs blessés. Pour le chercheur Vincent Foucher, les jihadistes ont anticipé la réponse militaire de Ndjamena.

findings.title: Interceptor missiles launched from Kiryat Shmona after drone alert
findings.summary:
Interceptor missiles launched from Kiryat Shmona after drone alert

    
    

        
    
                Israeli Channel 12 reported that two interceptor missiles were launched from Kiryat Shmona towards southern Lebanon after a suspicious aerial target was detected near the border area.

The incident came amid continuing cross-border tensions and military operations between Israel and Hezbollah.

The Israeli military later said it had intercepted a “suspicious aerial target” in the area ...
findings.text:
Interceptor missiles launched from Kiryat Shmona after drone alert | Interceptor missiles launched from Kiryat Shmona after drone alert

    
    

        
    
                Israeli Channel 12 reported that two interceptor missiles were launched from Kiryat Shmona towards southern Lebanon after a suspicious aerial target was detected near the border area.

The incident came amid continuing cross-border tensions and military operations between Israel and Hezbollah.

The Israeli military later said it had intercepted a “suspicious aerial target” in the area ...

findings.title: KP CM Afridi decries decisions made behind closed doors during visit to Bannu
findings.summary:
Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi on Monday decried decisions taken behind closed doors, saying that the provincial government would oppose those decisions that went against peace in the province and the people’s interests.
He made the remarks during a visit to Bannu, after 15 police personnel were martyred and three sustained injuries after a suicide attack on the Fateh Khel police post.
According to a statement issued by the CM House, Afridi met the families of the martyred po...

findings.title: Passageiros começam a deixar navio onde houve surto de hantavírus
findings.summary:
Passageiros e tripulantes do navio MV Hondius começaram a ser retirados da embarcação na manhã deste domingo (10), quase um mês após um surto de hantavírus matar três pessoas a bordo.

Quatorze espanhóis, sendo 13 passageiros e um membro da tripulação, foram os primeiros a deixar o navio, por volta das 5h30 de hoje (horário de Brasília).

Notícias relacionadas:Países europeus irão retirar cidadãos de navio com surto de hantavírus.OMS reporta seis casos confirmados de hantavírus ligados a cruz...

findings.title: All technologies shown at SAHA 2026 already deployed on frontlines – RAROG
findings.summary: Ukrainian defense technology company RAROG showcased its developments in armor protection, equipment, strike drones, and integrated frontline solutions at the international defense exhibition SAHA 2026 in Istanbul. All of these products are already deployed in combat conditions.

findings.title: EN DIRECT - Guerre au Moyen-Orient: les États-Unis continuent d’avoir des «exigences déraisonnables» selon l'Iran
findings.summary: Donald Trump ⁠a qualifié dimanche ​soir de « totalement inacceptable » la réponse iranienne à la proposition de Washington destinée à mettre fin à leur ​conflit, tandis que Téhéran a dénoncé des « demandes excessives » qui équivaudraient à une capitulation, a rapporté la presse officielle iranienne. Peu après, Benyamin Netanyahu a fait part de sa détermination à récupérer l'uranium iranien dans une interview à la télévision CBS.

Peu après, Benyamin Netanyahu a fait part de sa détermination à récupérer l'uranium iranien dans une interview à la télévision CBS.
